claims.claim_text: Tokyo Metro IC card fare for 1-6km

sources.title: Tokyo Metro — Regular Tickets (Fares)
sources.note: Official Tokyo Metro fare table: 1km-6km adult IC card fare 178 yen (paper ticket 180 yen). Includes 10 yen railway station barrier-free fee. Cross-checked against official PASMO fare page and official PDF information_20250401.pdf (effective 2025-04-01).

verification_event.note: Read directly from tokyometro.jp official fare pages (EN + JP) and official PDF. 2026-06-27 기준. 최종 사람 승인 대기.

claims.claim_text: Tokyo Metro IC card fare for 7-11km

sources.title: Tokyo Metro — Regular Tickets (Fares)
sources.note: Official Tokyo Metro fare table: 7km-11km adult IC card fare 209 yen (paper ticket 210 yen). Includes 10 yen railway station barrier-free fee. Cross-checked against official PASMO fare page and official PDF information_20250401.pdf (effective 2025-04-01).

verification_event.note: Read directly from tokyometro.jp official fare pages (EN + JP) and official PDF. 2026-06-27 기준. 최종 사람 승인 대기.
